headline: Bubbles McSqueaky Opens Pet Store That Sells Invisible Dogs, Calls Them 'Imagination Pooches'
summary: Each invisible dog comes with an invisible leash and 'conceptual poop bags.'
fullBody: Bubbles McSqueaky has opened 'Phantom Paws,' a pet store selling invisible dogs. 'Real dogs are messy,' McSqueaky explained. 'Imagination dogs are perfect.' Each 'Imagination Pooch' costs $500 and includes an invisible leash, a phantom food bowl, and 'conceptual poop bags.' Owners report 'zero shedding' and 'unconditional love, probably.' 'I took mine for a walk,' one owner said. 'The neighbors stared.'
